title: [MTR] N700 Series Shinkansen
description: N700, N700A, N700S and Kamome Series Shinkansen addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
### This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds multiple variants of the N700 Shinkansen family to the game :
- N700 Series
- N700A Series
- N700S Series
- Kamome Series

The N700, N700A and N700S share passenger cars but have unique cabs. Kamome has its own separate set.

HD Bogie versions are provided with [Yakuro](https://modrinth.com/user/yakuro)'s help. Please check out his packs!

Recommended lengths:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 6 cars -> 157 blocks
- 8 cars -> 209 blocks
- 10 cars -> 261 blocks
- 12 cars -> 313 blocks
- 16 cars -> 417 blocks

</details>

Make sure to check the license if you're interested in making other liveries. Additionally, you are allowed to use this ressource pack in servers, let's plays and other creations providing that you give credit.

**[Check out my other Shinkansen packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

### Enjoy it!

![N700](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0bc0a193ce5122cc88eafaacce2b3e737e83d17.jpeg)
